svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="PUA三条红线与5步穷尽" id="puaModel1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-131" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="PUA 把 AI 三个老毛病固化成硬性行为协议" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="500" x="200" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="红线一 · 闭环意识
你说做完了？数据在哪？
没证据的完成 = 自嗨" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="红线二 · 事实驱动
"可能是环境问题"——验证了吗？
未验证的归因 = 甩锅" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="325" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="红线三 · 穷尽一切
"我搞不定"——5 步走完了吗？
没走完 = 缺乏韧性" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="610" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="STITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="5 步穷尽（想放弃前必须按序走完）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="280" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="① 复现" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="40" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="② 隔离" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="210" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="③ 假设验证" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="380" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="④ 最小修复" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="550" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="⑤ 回归" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="720" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ES12" edge="1" parent="1" source="S1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="S2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ES23" edge="1" parent="1" source="S2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="S3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ES34" edge="1" parent="1" source="S3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="S4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ES45" id="RCA" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="RCA 诊断行（动手前必写）

证据来源：错误原文 / 源码 / 复现 / 官方文档 / 历史先例" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="660" x="120" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="本质：把资深工程师的复盘习惯，塞进 AI 的肌肉记忆 —— 不是 PUA，是纪律执行器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="700" x="100" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
